usage_notes: Stats are grouped by category for slide selection. Use 'stat' and 'label' for STAT-formatted slides (36pt Bold Blue number + sub-label). All figures sourced from DALP canonical narrative, capability mapping, and product docs.

platform_scope.label: Pre-built asset classes
platform_scope.detail: Bonds, equity, funds, deposits, stablecoins, real estate, precious metals — plus configurable custom types via the DALP Asset model

platform_scope.label: Compliance module types
platform_scope.detail: Jurisdiction, eligibility, holding periods, supply limits, transfer conditions — enforced ex-ante before execution

platform_scope.label: API endpoints
platform_scope.detail: Full REST API surface for integration with core banking, custody, and risk systems

operational_depth.label: Pre-built observability dashboards
operational_depth.detail: Full-stack observability: VictoriaMetrics (metrics), Loki (logs), Tempo (traces), Grafana dashboards, automated Slack alerting

operational_depth.label: Deployment models
operational_depth.detail: Managed SaaS, private cloud, on-premises, or hybrid — same lifecycle capabilities across all options

infrastructure.label: Supported EVM-compatible networks
infrastructure.detail: Public and permissioned EVM-compatible blockchain networks

security_and_governance.label: Access control model
security_and_governance.detail: Role-based access control with 5 defined roles, maker-checker approval workflows, configurable multi-signature quorum, and formal recovery procedures

security_and_governance.label: Hardware security module compatible
security_and_governance.detail: Key management with HSM compatibility and formal recovery procedures

settlement.label: Atomic settlement
settlement.detail: DvP and XvP atomic settlement including cross-venue settlement via the XVP module

integration.label: API protocols
integration.detail: REST, GraphQL, event webhooks, and oRPC provide programmatic access to every platform capability

integration.label: Payment rail standard
integration.detail: Payment rail connectivity for SWIFT, SEPA, and RTGS via ISO 20022 standards

integration.label: Custodian integrations
integration.detail: Bring-your-own-custodian model with Fireblocks and DFNS integrations; DALP orchestrates custody policy, not custody itself

lifecycle.label: Core lifecycle pillars
lifecycle.detail: Issuance, compliance, custody, settlement, and servicing as integrated modules covering the full asset lifecycle from creation to retirement

lifecycle.label: Regulatory jurisdictions modeled
lifecycle.detail: Compliance modules model requirements for EU MiCA, Singapore MAS, UK FCA, and Japan FSA frameworks

lifecycle.label: Defined custody roles
lifecycle.detail: Role-based access control with 5 defined roles, configurable multi-signature quorum, and emergency pause capability
